name: Bonded Premises Transfer Exemption

eligibility.description: Requires transfer to the bonded premises of another manufacturer or export warehouse proprietor or release in bond from customs custody.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Tobacco products and processed tobacco transferred to bonded premises of another manufacturer or export warehouse are exempt from immediate packaging and marking requirements, allowing for tax-deferred movement of inventory.
